sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 11

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 11:1
items.html: (to the question) For example, if the upper one rose as MAN [Mayin Nukvin] to the upper-upper for the attainment of Neshama: the MAN of the lower one, cleaving there to the AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] of Neshama of the upper one, attain there a level of the discernment of GE [Galgalta ve Eynaim] of Neshama, which is the secret of the Rucha [spirit], which the upper one takes in addition to its own share, as is known. Afterwards, upon the upper one's coming to its place, it gives that Rucha to the lower one — not all at once, but in measures, little by little, as is known. However, after the lower one has already received the entire level that emerged in the upper-upper upon the MAN of its GE, and it has nothing more to receive, the begetting from its upper one ceases, in the secret of "it ceased to be with Sarah after the manner of women." For it has nothing more to beget and give to the lower one, since all that it gives the lower one it gives only of its own — namely, of that Rucha. (Item 15)
